---
title: "Interactive LLM Framework Explorer"
description: Explore different Python LLM frameworks and their capabilities through interactive Shiny templates
---

Explore various Python frameworks for building LLM-powered applications. Select a framework below, then choose from basic chat, structured output, or tool calling capabilities.

::: {.panel-tabset .panel-pills}

## LangChain

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Basic

**A Chat app leveraging LangChain framework**

This app allows users to interact with a language model using the LangChain framework.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-langchain-basic.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/langchain-basic){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template langchain-basic --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `langchain-core`
- `langchain-openai`
- `langchain`
- `dotenv`

### Structured Output

**LangChain Chat with Structured Output**

Shows how to constrain model responses to a structured schema using LangChain (e.g., pydantic or JSON mode).

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-langchain-structured-output.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/langchain-structured-output){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template langchain-structured-output --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `langchain-core`
- `langchain-openai`
- `langchain`
- `pydantic`
- `dotenv`

### Tool Calling

**LangChain Chat with Tool Calling**

Demonstrates using LangChain to enable the model to select and invoke tools/functions during a chat session.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-langchain-tool-calling.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/langchain-tool-calling){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template langchain-tool-calling --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `langchain-core`
- `langchain-openai`
- `langchain`
- `dotenv`

:::

## LlamaIndex

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Basic

**Basic Chat with LlamaIndex**

Minimal LlamaIndex-powered chat demonstrating a direct LLM conversation loop.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-llama-index-basic.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/llama-index-basic){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template llama-index-basic --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `llama-index`
- `llama-index-llms-openai`
- `pydantic`
- `dotenv`

### Structured Output

**Structured Output with LlamaIndex**

Chat example producing structured (JSON / schema) responses using LlamaIndex tools.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-llama-index-structured-output.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/llama-index-structured-output){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template llama-index-structured-output --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `llama-index`
- `llama-index-llms-openai`
- `pydantic`
- `dotenv`

### Tool Calling

**Tool Calling with LlamaIndex**

Demonstrates model-invoked tool (function) calls orchestrated by LlamaIndex.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-llama-index-tool-calling.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/llama-index-tool-calling){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template llama-index-tool-calling --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `llama-index`
- `llama-index-llms-openai`
- `pytz`
- `dotenv`

:::

## LLM Package

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Basic

**Basic Chat using llm package**

Simple chat illustrating a direct conversation loop with llm package abstractions.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-llm-package-basic.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/llm-package-basic){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template llm-package-basic --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `llm`
- `openai`
- `dotenv`

### Structured Output

**Structured Output with llm package**

Shows enforcing structured schema in responses using llm package utilities.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-llm-package-structured-output.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/llm-package-structured-output){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template llm-package-structured-output --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `llm`
- `openai`
- `pydantic`
- `dotenv`

### Tool Calling

**Tool Calling with llm package**

Demonstrates dispatching tool/function calls via llm package orchestration.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-llm-package-tool-calling.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/llm-package-tool-calling){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template llm-package-tool-calling --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `llm`
- `openai`
- `dotenv`

:::

## Pydantic AI

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Basic

**Basic Chat with Pydantic-AI**

Simple chat using Pydantic models for validated inputs/outputs.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-pydantic-ai-basic.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/pydantic-ai-basic){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template pydantic-ai-basic --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `pydantic-ai`
- `dotenv`

### Structured Output

**Structured Output with Pydantic-AI**

Uses Pydantic models to shape and validate structured responses from the model.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-pydantic-ai-structured-output.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/pydantic-ai-structured-output){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template pydantic-ai-structured-output --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `pydantic-ai`
- `pydantic`
- `dotenv`

### Tool Calling

**Tool Calling with Pydantic-AI**

Demonstrates invoking and validating tool calls with Pydantic-AI patterns.

[{{< fa eye >}} View App](https://posit-ai-pydantic-ai-tool-calling.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands github >}} View Source](https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/pydantic-ai-tool-calling){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```bash
shiny create --template pydantic-ai-tool-calling --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```

**Packages:**
- `pydantic-ai`
- `dotenv`

:::

:::
